description: Flow duration in seconds.
Total number of packets across both directions.
Total number of bytes exchanged across both directions.
Time delta between repeated flows of the same communication pattern.
Packet rate within the flow, typically computed as packets per second.
Byte direction ratio capturing asymmetry between forward and reverse traffic.
Inverse-frequency indicator of the destination port within the corpus.
Time-to-live observed for packets from the source side.
Time-to-live observed for packets from the destination side.
Packet loss or retransmission-related indicator on the source side.
Packet loss or retransmission-related indicator on the destination side.
Source-to-destination throughput measured in bits per second.
Destination-to-source throughput measured in bits per second.
Number of packets sent from source to destination.
Number of packets sent from destination to source.
Source-side TCP window size.
Destination-side TCP window size.
TCP payload bytes transmitted from source to destination.
TCP payload bytes transmitted from destination to source.
Mean packet size for packets sent by the source.
Mean packet size for packets sent by the destination.
Depth of the TCP transaction or exchange.
Number of TCP response bytes observed in the flow.
Jitter in inter-packet arrival times on the source side.
Jitter in inter-packet arrival times on the destination side.
Source-side inter-packet timing statistic.
Destination-side inter-packet timing statistic.
Estimated TCP round-trip time.
Time elapsed between SYN and SYN-ACK during connection establishment.
Time elapsed before the first ACK is observed.
Count of flows sharing similar connection state and TTL characteristics.
Number of distinct HTTP methods associated with the flow or local context.
Transport-layer protocol, e.g., TCP, UDP, or ICMP.
Discretized entropy indicator representing distributional irregularity.
JA3 fingerprint derived from the client TLS handshake.
JA3S fingerprint derived from the server TLS handshake.
TLS Server Name Indication value observed in the handshake.
HTTP Host header value.
HTTP URL path or request target.
HTTP User-Agent string.
SSH client version string or banner.
SSH server version string or banner.
Queried DNS name or domain.
DNS record type, e.g., A, AAAA, MX, TXT.
Connection state label describing protocol/session behavior.
Inferred application-layer service, e.g., HTTP, SSH, TLS, DNS.
Canonicalized bidirectional communication key derived from IPs and ports.
